overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a realistic survival shooter game. The player navigates a dark rural village at night, moving along dirt paths past wooden farmhouses and encountering an NPC with a torch before continuing into open fields.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path toward a village, holding a rifle with both hands visible at the bottom of the frame

entered.detail: two-story wooden rural building with dark roof, visible against the night sky
narrow dirt trail winding through grass terrain
dark grassy fields flanking both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a dirt path at night toward a rural settlement. A large wooden farmhouse dominates the left side of the frame while open fields stretch to the right. The environment is very dark with only starlight and minimal ambient light illuminating the scene.

events.description: encountering an NPC holding a lit torch in the center of the path ahead

agents.ego_description: moving through the village center and approaching a figure holding a torch, weapon still raised

notable_agents.action: standing stationary in the path holding a torch, illuminating the immediate area with flame

entered.detail: wooden rural structures lining the path through the village
simple wooden fence posts along the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The player enters the village center, passing between wooden buildings. Around the 30-second mark, an NPC holding a torch appears in the path ahead, providing the primary light source. The player continues forward, passing the stationary figure.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path away from the village into open countryside, maintaining a steady pace

entered.detail: dark silhouette of trees on the horizon ahead

segments.scene_description: Leaving the village behind, the player moves into open fields. The surroundings become very dark with only the night sky visible above and the dirt path continuing forward. The village buildings fade from view as the player progresses deeper into the rural landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the outskirts of a dim rural settlement into the oppressive darkness of open countryside. It begins with a walk along a dirt path under a starlit sky, passing a large wooden farmhouse that looms over the left side of the frame. As the camera enters the village center, the ambient gloom is momentarily broken by an NPC holding a torch, whose flickering light illuminates the path as the player passes the stationary figure. The scene then shifts away from the wooden buildings, moving steadily forward until the structures fade from view. Finally, the environment opens up into vast, dark fields where only the night sky remains visible above the continuing dirt path.
